corpus-ingest-llm.description: The LLM ingestion stages (haiku fan-out + sonnet consolidation) drive REAL models via the agent-mcp provider. Required only when AGENT_REGISTRY_INGEST_LIVE=1 runs the live pipeline; absent => the LLM stages skip (not fail) and CI runs the deterministic replay fixture. Needs Claude model access (Claude Max OAuth keychain / ANTHROPIC_API_KEY, or claudecli on PATH).
corpus-ingest-llm.verification: test -n "$AGENT_REGISTRY_INGEST_LIVE" && { security find-generic-password -s 'Claude Code' >/dev/null 2>&1 || test -n "$ANTHROPIC_API_KEY" || command -v claude >/dev/null 2>&1; }
corpus-ingest-llm.how_to_provide: Provide Claude model access (sign in to Claude Code for keychain OAuth, or export ANTHROPIC_API_KEY, or install the claude CLI) and set AGENT_REGISTRY_INGEST_LIVE=1 to run the live ingestion. Leave unset for the deterministic replay (CI default).
